systems.name: OpenCode Codex Provider Request Pipeline
systems.description: Per-turn pipeline that turns OpenCode session state into a Responses API request body aligned with upstream codex-cli wire layout.

containers.name: packages/opencode session module
containers.description: Hosts PromptAssembler, FragmentRegistry, BundleAssembler, PersonaRouter (llm.ts, system.ts, context-fragments/).

containers.name: packages/opencode-codex-provider
containers.description: Hosts convertPrompt, buildResponsesApiRequest, WS Transport (convert.ts, provider.ts, transport-ws.ts).

containers.name: OpenAI Responses API (external)
containers.description: Receives outbound request; applies prefix cache scoped by prompt_cache_key; manages chain state via previous_response_id.

containers.name: Capability source files
containers.description: Persona files (prompt/codex.txt, model-specific *_prompt.md), AGENTS.md, SYSTEM.md, SkillLayerRegistry, ManagedAppRegistry.

components.name: PromptAssembler
components.description: Top-level orchestrator inside llm.ts; resolves driver text, collects fragments, requests bundle assembly, hands off to streamText.

components.name: PersonaRouter
components.description: Resolves driver text from upstream prompt md by model.api.id with default.md fallback; replaces buildStaticBlock for system_block_0 producer.

components.name: FragmentRegistry
components.description: NEW: collects ContextFragment instances from session/agent/skill/MCP producers; dedups by id; emits ordered fragment list per ROLE.

components.name: BundleAssembler
components.description: NEW: groups fragments by ROLE, wraps each body with START/END markers (skip if empty), joins into one bundled ResponseItem per ROLE.

components.name: convertPrompt
components.description: Maps LMv2 prompt → {instructions, input[]}. Post-realign: instructions=driver only; input[] prepends developer + user bundle items before conversation history.

components.name: buildResponsesApiRequest
components.description: Assembles final HTTP body. Post-realign: prompt_cache_key=threadId only (no accountId prefix).

components.name: WS Transport
components.description: Manages WebSocket connection + previous_response_id chain + per-account swap; consumed by tryWsTransport.
components.technology: TypeScript (transport-ws.ts, partial review for DD-6 side effects)

components.name: Prefix Cache Layer
components.description: External: scoped by prompt_cache_key; honors token-level prefix match; reports usage.input_tokens_details.cached_tokens.

components.name: Chain State
components.description: External: server-side conversation state holding prior input items; addressed via previous_response_id; appended on delta calls.

relationships.label: developer + user ResponseItem prepend to messages
